summary: Iteration 41 - Tested all 4 redesigned mobile dashboards (Parent, Coach, Player, Management). Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 role dashboards load with correct content, stats, lists, bottom nav and logout flow works across all roles.

issues: Long uppercase Greek names wrap / overflow / truncate in hero card (e.g. 'ΝΊΚΟΣ ΠΑΠΑΔΌΠΟΥΛΟΣ' runs past card edge, player card shows 'ΑΝΔΡΈ…' truncation). Consider text-clamp / smaller font-size on small screens.
Match date renders as 'Invalid Date' on result cards - likely date parsing on fixture.match_date (pre-existing from iter 40, not a redesign regression, but still user-visible).

Below the stats grid the screen is mostly empty - no upcoming events / fixtures / announcements surfaced even though the /api/mobile/player/dashboard endpoint returns events & announcements. Consider rendering at least a 'Next match' and 'Ανακοινωσεις' section to fill the page.

action_items: (Minor/Optional) Fix 'Invalid Date' render on match-result cards in home dashboard (affects parent + coach).
(Minor/Optional) Prevent hero name overflow/truncation in coach and player hero cards.
(Minor/Optional) Populate player dashboard below stats grid with events / announcements (data is already returned by backend).
critical_code_review_comments: mobile_auth.py coach/player/management dashboards all properly exclude MongoDB _id (good).
Role check uses 403 correctly for wrong-role access (validated in tests).
Player stats aggregation iterates all fixtures client-side in endpoint - OK for current scale, may need index/aggregation pipeline later.
test_credentials: Mobile OTP (mocked, code in otp_debug). Parent: +357 99 555666, Coach: +357 99 222222, Player: +357 99 333333, Management: +357 99 111111.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter41 verified 4 new role-based dashboard endpoints (/api/mobile/{coach|player|management}/dashboard) + regression on /api/mobile/parent/dashboard. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_mobile_dashboards_iter41.py covers role detection, dashboard shape, wrong-role 403, no-auth 401, and /auth/me for all 4 roles. Frontend dashboards verified visually on 390x844 mobile viewport - all 4 roles load unique UIs, bottom nav (5 tabs) present, logout flow returns to /app/login for each role. Euro € symbol renders correctly in Management financial overview (fix from main agent confirmed).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/mobile/auth/request-otp + verify-otp work for all 4 phones; role_detected is correct for each
Backend: GET /api/mobile/coach/dashboard returns teams, groups, players, fixtures, events, announcements, training_sessions
Backend: GET /api/mobile/coach/dashboard returns 401/403 without auth / 403 with player token
Backend: GET /api/mobile/player/dashboard returns player, stats{goals,assists,appearances,minutes}, fixtures, events, announcements
Backend: GET /api/mobile/player/dashboard returns 403 with coach token
Backend: GET /api/mobile/management/dashboard returns teams, groups, player_count, financial{revenue,pending,overdue}, registrations, announcements, events
Backend: GET /api/mobile/management/dashboard returns 403 with parent token
Backend: GET /api/mobile/auth/me returns correct role for all 4 accounts

Frontend: Parent login -> dashboard shows Καλως ηρθες / APPROVAL PARENT / stats (Ομαδες, Αγωνες, Παρουσιες 50%) / ΤΑ ΠΑΙΔΙΑ ΜΟΥ with 3 kid cards / ΟΜΑΔΕΣ / ΤΕΛΕΥΤΑΙΑ ΑΠΟΤΕΛΕΣΜΑΤΑ / bottom nav / logout works
Frontend: Coach login -> Γεια σου Προπονητη / ΝΙΚΟΣ ΠΑΠΑΔΟΠΟΥΛΟΣ / stats (26 Παικτες, 5 Ομαδες, 20 Προπονησεις) / ΟΜΑΔΕΣ ΜΟΥ list / ΠΡΟΠΟΝΗΣΕΙΣ list with dates / results / bottom nav / logout works
Frontend: Player login -> hero card ΑΝΔΡΕΑΣ ΠΡΑΣΤΙΤΗΣ #1 Goalkeeper / stats grid (Γκολ, Ασιστ, Αγωνες, Λεπτα = 0 as expected) / bottom nav / logout works

Frontend: Management login -> Διοικηση LEFTERIA FC / KPIs (26 Παικτες, 5 Ομαδες, 0 Εγγραφες, €0 Εσοδα) / ΟΙΚΟΝΟΜΙΚΗ ΕΠΙΣΚΟΠΗΣΗ with € symbol / ΟΜΑΔΕΣ list / ΠΡΟΣΦΑΤΕΣ ΕΓΓΡΑΦΕΣ / bottom nav / logout works
Frontend: Bottom nav (Αρχικη, Ημερολογιο, Αγωνες, Μηνυματα, Προφιλ) visible on all 4 role dashboards
Frontend: Profile -> Αποσύνδεση flow returns all 4 roles to /app/login

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - OTP returned in otp_debug field and rendered on screen
